game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Leo's Fortune:** Players control Leo, a sentient furball, navigating 24 hand-crafted platforming levels by using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and swiping up on the right side to inflate, allowing Leo to float or roll faster, and swiping down to deflate for precise landings. The core gameplay involves solving physics-based puzzles by manipulating environmental objects, activating switches, and timing movements to avoid various traps and hazards. The objective in each level is to collect all scattered gold coins, which act as breadcrumbs left by a thief, to progress to the next stage. Upon completing all 24 levels, a Hard-core Mode is unlocked, challenging players to finish the entire game without dying, with Game Center leaderboards tracking fastest completion times for each level.
game_info.description: Leo's Fuzzball Adventure puts you in control of Leo, a sentient, physics-defying ball of fuzz. Navigate through a hand-crafted level filled with treacherous spikes, floating platforms, and hidden gold coins. The goal is to collect all the gold coins scattered throughout the level to unlock the exit door. Use Leo's unique ability to inflate (become light and floaty) or deflate (become heavy and precise) to solve platforming puzzles and gain momentum. Master the momentum to traverse loops and gaps!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Move Leo horizontally and build momentum.
- Space / Arrow Up: Inflate Leo. Makes him lighter, floatier, and jump higher.
- Arrow Down: Deflate Leo. Makes him heavier, fall faster, and stick to the ground.
- Enter: Start the game from the title screen.
- Esc: Pause or Unpause the game.
- R: Restart the game from the beginning (available in game or game over screens).

TEST_1.test_description: Basic horizontal movement and physics verification.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test will simulate holding the Right Arrow key to ensure the player character accelerates and moves horizontally across the screen.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player X position should increase significantly over 120 frames. The test passes if the final X position is greater than the initial X position by a margin.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The test will simulate holding the Right Arrow key and intermittently holding Space (Inflate) to simulate jumping or floating.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player Y position should decrease (go up) relative to the ground level, and X position should increase. Confirms jump physics are working.
TEST_2.strategy: The test will simulate holding the Right Arrow key and intermittently holding Space (Inflate) to simulate jumping or floating.
TEST_2.expected: Player Y position should decrease (go up) relative to the ground level, and X position should increase. Confirms jump physics are working.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will navigate towards the nearest coin using a heuristic (move x towards coin, jump if coin is high or stuck).
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The score should increase from 0 within a reasonable timeframe (e.g., 600 frames), indicating a coin was successfully collected.
